summary: Phase 3 Admin DataTable migration UI test (9 list pages). 8 of 9 pages render without crash and DataTable works correctly. Login OK. UsersAdmin drill-down + sortable headers (4 keys) + search + edit dialog all working. MasterData (items/vendors/employees/coa/brands/outlets) renders rows + drill-down. Loyalty Redemptions empty state correct. Loyalty Customers, Audit Log (50 rows, 3 sortable cols), Operations Logs/Scheduler/Archival render fine. CRITICAL BLOCKER: /admin/tour-analytics crashes with ReferenceError: Table is not defined — same half-migration pattern (imports DataTable but JSX body still uses unimported shadcn <Table>/<TableHeader>/<TableRow>/<TableHead>/<TableBody>/<TableCell>) that previously affected UsersAdmin / MasterData / LoyaltyAdminRedemptions.

ui_bugs.issue: Page crashes — ErrorBoundary catches `ReferenceError: Table is not defined` (ERR-34QYGH). File /app/frontend/src/portals/admin/TourAnalytics/index.jsx imports DataTable at line 36 but still uses <Table>, <TableHeader>, <TableRow>, <TableHead>, <TableBody>, <TableCell> from line 234+ without importing them. This is exactly the same half-migration bug pattern that previously affected UsersAdmin/MasterData/LoyaltyAdminRedemptions (LoadingState/Skeleton). Migration was left incomplete for this file.

action_items: Finish TourAnalytics DataTable migration: replace the shadcn <Table>/<TableHeader>/<TableRow>/<TableHead>/<TableBody>/<TableCell> block (around line 234+ in /app/frontend/src/portals/admin/TourAnalytics/index.jsx) with a <DataTable> using the columns spec (Tour/Starts/Completes/Skips/Closes/Completion%/Skip%/Users/Avg.Durasi), with sortable headers, renderExpanded drill-down, rowTestIdPrefix, and empty-state. Alternatively, just import the shadcn Table primitives — but per the migration goal you should use DataTable.
Verify retest after fix that /admin/tour-analytics renders DataTable rows (or empty state) and exposes data-testid prefixed rows.
critical_code_review_comments: Half-migration pattern recurs: when swapping the import to DataTable, ALWAYS replace the JSX body in the same commit. Consider adding an ESLint rule or a grep-based pre-commit hook to catch references to unimported <Table>/<TableRow>/etc.
DataTable.jsx: `next.has(id) ? next.delete(id) : next.add(id)` (line ~190) uses ternary for side-effects — works but is a lint smell (no-unused-expressions). Consider an if/else.
MasterData/Outlets and MasterData/COA returned 0 rows — likely empty in demo DB. Confirm seed scripts cover these to make manual QA easier.

success_rate.frontend: 89% (8/9 admin DataTable pages OK; TourAnalytics crashes)

context_for_next_testing_agent: After main agent fixes TourAnalytics, just re-run a quick playwright visit to /admin/tour-analytics with admin@torado.id and confirm no ErrorBoundary (look for absence of text 'Ups, ada yang tidak beres' and presence of data-testid prefixed rows or an empty-state element). All other 8 admin pages already validated: UsersAdmin sort testids are user-row-sort-full_name/email/status/last_login_at (NOT 'name'). MasterData sort/drilldown works on items. Redemptions empty-state testid is 'redemptions-empty'. Audit log shows 50 rows + 3 sortable headers. Operations logs/scheduler/archival render fine.
rca of the issue:
TourAnalytics/index.jsx was migrated to import DataTable from @/components/shared/DataTable (line 36) but the JSX body (lines 234–255+) was NOT rewritten — it still references , , , , , which were never imported, producing a runtime ReferenceError when React renders the component. ErrorBoundary catches it and shows ERR-34QYGH. Repro: login as admin, navigate /admin/tour-analytics. Mitigation: complete the DataTable migration in TourAnalytics/index.jsx (replace the entire
…
block with a as done in MasterData.jsx).
